description: One who studies under guidance; a person in the process of learning. 'Ronai' names the receptive mind—open, questioning, growing.
sound_symbolism: The word receives with growth. 'Ro' opens with ready receptivity, learning beginning. 'Na' settles with grounded study, knowledge taking root. Then 'i' rises to growing understanding.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo ronai' (the student). Learns from 'pholai' (mentor/teacher). Related to 'shelorai' (apprentice) but broader.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Student as beginner's mind—the openness that makes learning possible.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Student as apprentice—learning through doing alongside a master.
